$comment: Lane 3C (CDN resilience): the above-the-fold intro demo must never 404.
cdn.raku.games STATUS (2026-06-07): the self-hosted CDN (Cloudflare R2
custom domain) is NOT yet live - the host does not resolve
(net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED) and the capture-samples/ asset drop has not
happened. A previous revision pointed each sample's primary `url` at
cdn.raku.games, which made the hero demo fail in every browser. Until the
human asset drop lands (procedure: VENDORING.md + RAKU-OPERATIONS.md W0.1),
each sample's primary `url` points at its VERIFIED-WORKING public host so the
landing demo actually renders. `plannedSelfHostUrl` records the eventual
cdn.raku.games path so the self-host migration is a one-line swap once the
drop is done (and so this file documents the intent, not a live dependency).
Primary `url`s were re-verified with a ranged GET on 2026-06-07: each
returns 206, Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *, and supports Range requests.
bytes is the verified Content-Length. superSplatLoadable is true only for
resolveSampleUrl() in capture_app.js takes the primary `url`; loadSplatViewer
degrades to a labelled 2D placeholder if it is ever unreachable, so the
intro never shows a broken canvas.

samples.label: Fireplace nook
samples.description: A scene-scale interior (fireplace corner) - smallest sample, fastest first paint; the default above-the-fold hero preview.
samples.source: Spark renderer project (sparkjsdev/spark) - official example asset hosted at sparkjs.dev, listed in examples/assets.json.
samples.license: Distributed as an example asset alongside the MIT-licensed Spark project. Demo-only.

samples.label: Painted bedroom
samples.description: A room-scale bedroom capture - small download, good first paint above the fold.
samples.source: World Labs - Forge public scene set (forge-dev-public GCS bucket); referenced by the Spark renderer's examples manifest (examples/assets.json).
samples.license: Public sample asset distributed by World Labs for use with the MIT-licensed Spark renderer. Demo-only.

samples.label: Greyscale room
samples.description: A furnished room-scale interior scene - a good stand-in for the 'scan your living room' hero use case (largest download, ~30 MB).
samples.source: World Labs - Forge / Marble public scene set (forge-dev-public GCS bucket); referenced by the Spark renderer's own examples manifest (examples/assets.json).
samples.license: Public sample asset distributed by World Labs for use with the MIT-licensed Spark renderer. Provided as a demo asset; treat as demo-only, not for redistribution as a product asset.
